The '''ED4''' was a model of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]<ref name="ISB" /> that served as the basis for the [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] series of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[storage and transceiving droid]]s.<ref name="I2-CG">{{CSWECite|II||I2-CG}}</ref>
